headlines.headline: NBA championship and Finals MVP odds: Spurs still favorites to advance past Wolves heading into Game 5
headlines.description: The San Antonio Spurs head into Game 5 against the Minnesota Timberwolves with -390 odds to win the series.

headlines.headline: Tuesday's NBA betting tips, DFS picks: Count on Wemby in Game 5?
headlines.description: Eric Moody breaks down Tuesday's Timberwolves-Spurs playoff game and offers his favorite bets and DFS plays.

headlines.headline: Why Stephen A. credits the NBA for not suspending Wemby
headlines.description: Stephen A. Smith says Victor Wembanyama's elbow to Naz Reid warranted a suspension, but he explains why he's glad the NBA decided against it.

headlines.headline: NFLPA head: Players strongly want 'high quality' grass fields
headlines.description: Citing how FIFA was "rolling out the green carpet" for the World Cup, the NFLPA's JC Tretter said NFL players want the same high-quality surfaces.

headlines.headline: Penguins GM would 'love' to have Evgeni Malkin back next season
headlines.description: Pittsburgh Penguins GM Kyle Dubas said Tuesday he would "love" to have longtime center Evgeni Malkin back for a 21st season with the franchise.

headlines.headline: Sabres going back to Ukko-Pekka Luukkonen at goalie for Game 4
headlines.description: The Sabres are going back to Ukko-Pekka Luukkonen in net for Game 4 of their second-round Eastern Conference playoff series against Montreal on Tuesday.

headlines.headline: Blue Jackets give Charlie Coyle 6-year, $36 million deal
headlines.description: The Blue Jackets have re-signed center Charlie Coyle to a six-year, $36 million contract.

headlines.headline: Motion to dismiss charges denied in Gaudreau brothers' deaths
headlines.description: Attorneys for the accused driver in the deaths of Johnny and Matthew Gaudreau argued that charges should be dismissed over a discrepancy in blood alcohol level reporting.

headlines.headline: Michael McCarron calls out Josh Manson for being a ‘dirty player’
headlines.description: Wild center Michael McCarron calls Josh Manson a "dirty player" after the Avalanche defenseman hit him with the blunt end of his stick.

headlines.headline: How Taylor Hall found his MVP form again with the Hurricanes
headlines.description: The No. 1 pick (2010) and Hart Trophy winner (2018) is a critical player for the Canes, who have yet to lose this postseason.
